name: Ultimate Hero Clash!
description: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles VS Power Rangers: Ultimate Hero Clash" pits two beloved teenage superhero groups against each other. Choose your favorite characters and fight for mystical relics. Upgrade your hero by defeating other heroes in close combat. Immerse yourself in the action-packed atmosphere and use your special abilities wisely!
instructions: The gameplay is easy to get used to and the controls allow you to have a smooth and dynamic fighting experience You can use the arrows to move then attack by pressing the A key The S key will also deal damage to your enemy with a strong attack
tags: Action, Best, Fighting, H5, Hot, New, Ninja
